episodes.title: Victim of Sex Cult Eventually Murdered | Finally Caught | Crime Up Close
episodes.description:
A hardware store clerk didn't show up to work after a date the previous night, and despite the whole torn looking for her, she never reappeared. What followed was a tangled web of lies and deceit behind this horrible murder.

episodes.title: The Cult of Charles Manson | Crime Up Close | Born To Kill?
episodes.description:
Charles Manson and his so-called 'family' were responsible for at least nine murders in California in the late 1960s and early 1970s, including actress Sharon Tate.

Subscribe to Crime Up Close: https://bit.ly/CrimeUpClose
